calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-14-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up
Off Calendar Jan-24-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Douglas Holloway, Esq. for Plaintiff: Bank of the West.
Order waiving live testimony and Declaration of Plaintiff's Witness: Ernest Knowle, are in the court file.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Satinder Randhawa ind and dba Baba Budda Carrier as follows:
Principal $32,438.23
Prejudgment Interest $1,163.28
Attorney's Fees $2,500.00
Costs $360.50, for a total of $36,462.01
Judgment signed in open court.

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-10-2006 Off Calendar
